product_overview: NEWSY TECH is a full-stack tech news platform with JWT-based authentication, personalized news, social engagement features, analytics, and an admin dashboard. This PRD focuses on the backend API surface and the core user journeys it supports.
core_goals: Provide reliable API access for authentication and account management
Deliver news discovery endpoints with pagination, headlines, trending, and article content extraction
Support personalized news preferences and saved-article workflows for authenticated users
Enable article engagement through comments and reactions
Track reading activity and expose user/site analytics
Provide admin-only user management and dashboard statistics
Maintain a stable health-check endpoint for liveness monitoring

features.name: Health Check
features.description: A lightweight liveness endpoint used to verify the API is running.
user_flows: GET /api/health -> Receive 200 with { status, message } confirming API is OK
GET /api/health on a healthy server -> Receive 200 with status OK -> GET /api/unknown -> Receive 404 for an invalid route

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Supports user registration, login, profile retrieval, profile updates, and profile picture management.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/register with valid name, email, and password -> Receive 201 with {_id, name, email, token} -> GET /api/auth/profile with JWT token -> Receive 200 with current user profile

POST /api/auth/login with valid email and password -> Receive 200 with {_id, name, email, token} -> PUT /api/auth/profile with token and updated fields -> Receive 200 with updated {_id, name, email, token} -> POST /api/auth/profile/picture with multipart image data -> Receive 200 with { profilePicture }
POST /api/auth/register with duplicate email or invalid input -> Receive 400 with { message }
POST /api/auth/login with wrong password -> Receive 401 with { message } -> GET /api/auth/profile without token -> Receive 401 with { message }

features.name: News Feed
features.description: Exposes public endpoints to browse tech news, top headlines, trending stories, and extract article content from a URL.
user_flows: GET /api/news?page=1&category=ai -> Receive 200 with { success, totalResults, articles, page, pageSize } -> GET /api/news/headlines -> Receive 200 with top technology headlines -> GET /api/news/trending -> Receive 200 with trending tech articles
POST /api/news/article-content with a valid article URL -> Receive 200 with { content }
GET /api/news with malformed query or when upstream NewsAPI fails -> Receive 500 with an error payload and no successful article list
POST /api/news/article-content with an invalid or unreachable URL -> Receive error response indicating content extraction failed

features.name: My News
features.description: Provides personalized news, topic preferences, and authenticated save/unsave workflows.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token -> GET /api/my-news/preferences with token -> Receive 200 with { preferences } -> PUT /api/my-news/preferences with token and updated topics -> Receive 200 with updated { preferences } -> GET /api/my-news with token -> Receive 200 with { articles }

POST /api/my-news/save with token and article payload -> Receive 201 with { article } -> GET /api/my-news/saved with token -> Receive 200 with saved { articles } -> DELETE /api/my-news/save/:articleUrl with token -> Receive 200 with { message }
GET /api/my-news without token -> Receive 401 with { message }
POST /api/my-news/save with duplicate or invalid article data -> Receive error response and article is not duplicated in the saved list

features.name: Saved Articles
features.description: Legacy authenticated CRUD endpoints for saving, listing, and deleting saved articles.
user_flows: POST /api/saved with token and article data -> Receive 201 with { success, article } -> GET /api/saved with token -> Receive 200 with { success, articles } -> DELETE /api/saved/:id with token -> Receive 200 with { success, message }
POST /api/saved without token -> Receive 401 with { message }
POST /api/saved with an article already saved -> Receive 400 with an error message
DELETE /api/saved/:id with a missing or unknown id -> Receive 404 or error response

features.name: Comments
features.description: Allows users to read, create, update, and delete comments on articles.
user_flows: GET /api/comments?articleUrl=https://example.com/article -> Receive 200 with { comments } -> POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/comments with token and comment body -> Receive 201 with { comment } -> PUT /api/comments/:id with token and edited content -> Receive 200 with updated { comment } -> DELETE /api/comments/:id with token -> Receive 200 with { message }
POST /api/comments without token -> Receive 401 with { message }
PUT /api/comments/:id for another user's comment -> Receive 403 or 404 error indicating the comment cannot be modified
DELETE /api/comments/:id without ownership -> Receive 403 or 404 error

features.name: Article Reactions
features.description: Supports public reaction counts and authenticated reaction toggling per article.
user_flows: GET /api/reactions?articleUrl=https://example.com/article -> Receive 200 with { counts, userReaction }

POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/reactions with token and article identifier -> Receive 200 with updated { counts, userReaction } -> POST /api/reactions again for the same article -> Receive 200 with toggled reaction state
POST /api/reactions without token -> Receive 401 with { message }
POST /api/reactions with invalid article reference -> Receive error response and reaction state remains unchanged

features.name: Analytics
features.description: Tracks reading sessions and returns user-level or site-level analytics data.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> POST /api/analytics/track with token and reading session data -> Receive 200 with { success } -> GET /api/analytics/me with token -> Receive 200 with { stats }
GET /api/analytics/site with admin token -> Receive 200 with { siteStats } -> GET /api/admin/stats with the same admin token -> Receive 200 with { stats }
POST /api/analytics/track without token -> Receive 401 with { message }
GET /api/analytics/site with a non-admin token -> Receive 403 with an authorization error

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Provides admin-only endpoints for user management, status changes, role toggling, bulk actions, and dashboard statistics.
user_flows: POST /api/auth/login with admin credentials -> Receive 200 with token -> GET /api/admin/stats with admin token -> Receive 200 with { stats } -> GET /api/admin/users -> Receive 200 with { users } -> GET /api/admin/users/:id -> Receive 200 with { user }

PUT /api/admin/users/:id/status with admin token and new status -> Receive 200 with updated { user } -> PUT /api/admin/users/:id/admin to toggle admin role -> Receive 200 with updated { user } -> POST /api/admin/users/bulk-action with admin token -> Receive 200 with { result }
GET /api/admin/users without admin privileges -> Receive 403 with an authorization error
DELETE /api/admin/users/:id with a non-admin token or invalid target -> Receive 403 or error response preventing unauthorized deletion

known_limitations.issue: NewsAPI rate limits may cause intermittent 500 errors on news endpoints
known_limitations.impact: News fetch tests may flake without mocking

known_limitations.issue: Duplicate saved article routes between /api/saved and /api/my-news
known_limitations.impact: Potential confusion for clients and testers
